raw_intake.concern_narrative: Customer review states that the pet vomited after receiving a flavored oral liquid compounded medication and the customer believes the flavor or formulation may have caused the reaction.

review_summary.customer_context_summary: The available review text reports vomiting after administration and attributes the event to flavor or formulation.
missing_information: Timing of vomiting relative to administration
evidence_limitations: The customer report alone does not establish causality.
Clinical severity cannot be fully assessed without follow-up details.
The public synthetic corpus cannot verify product-specific adverse-effect references unless synthetic API reference evidence is supplied.

derived_assessment.rationale: Vomiting after administration is treated as a potential adverse event and warrants quality review and follow-up. The synthetic case does not include hospitalization, death, threatened legal action, contamination, wrong medication, or veterinarian-alleged harm, so it is routed as unexpected non-life-threatening rather than automatic leadership escalation.
